title: jasminum pellucidum
intro: Jasminum pellucidum, also known as the Transparent Jasmine or White Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Traditional herbal preparations of Jasminum pellucidum include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
